title: Luffys Straw Hat Mod
description: This Adds Luffys Straw Hat From One Piece.
body:
Its A Mod That Add Luffys Straw Hat. 
You Can Craft It In Survival And Place It Down But The Fun Part Is When You Break It You Get It On You Head And Can Walk With It On Your Head.
But DONT Break It With Something On Your Head, Becuse Then It Wil disappear!
You Craft It With 8 Wheat And A Diamond Helmet, Or You Can Get It With: /give @a one_piece:luffys_straw_hat 1
